name: Iso11783IL_OPChangePriority
title: Iso11783IL_OPChangePriority
syntax: long Iso11783IL_OPChangePriority( dword maskID, dword priority ); // form 1
description: The function changes the priority of an alarm mask. A Change Priority command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: maskID
parameters.description: Object ID of an alarm mask
